articles.title: Knicks ride Karl-Anthony Towns’ rare triple-double to crucial Game 4 victory
articles.original_title: Knicks ride Karl-Anthony Towns’ rare triple-double to crucial Game 4 victory
articles.summary: Karl-Anthony Towns has long been known as one of the NBA's best-shooting big men.  On Saturday night, he showed he can be a pretty good passer, too.  Towns had the fifth triple-double in his 11-year career and first in the playoffs, leading the New York Knicks to a 114-98 win over the Atlanta Hawks to tie the first-round playoff series at two wins apiece.

articles.title: Jaden McDaniels angers the Nuggets again with a late layup that triggers shoving from Jokic
articles.original_title: Jaden McDaniels angers the Nuggets again with a late layup that triggers shoving from Jokic
articles.summary: The Denver-Minnesota rivalry took another dramatic turn in the closing seconds of Game 4 on Saturday, when Nuggets star Nikola Jokic confronted Jaden McDaniels after he took an uncontested layup with the Timberwolves on the way to victory and a 3-1 lead in the first-round NBA playoff series. The Rockets gain a strategic advantage with Doncic sidelined.

articles.title: Rich Paul Issues Ultimatum to Keep LeBron James with the Lakers
articles.original_title: "You won't find another" - Rich Paul issues a nuclear "ownership" ultimatum to ensure LeBron James remains a Laker for Life - Yahoo Sports
articles.summary: Agent Rich Paul delivered a firm message to Lakers ownership, stating that LeBron James is irreplaceable and demanding assurances that the franchise will remain his long‑term home. The statement underscores the importance of James to the team's brand and future planning.
key_points: Paul warned ownership that losing LeBron would be detrimental to the franchise.
He emphasized James' unique value and called for a clear, long‑term commitment.
The ultimatum reflects ongoing negotiations over contract and team direction.

articles.original_title: Evaluating LeBron James' one weakness: His love for Bojangles - ESPN
articles.summary: An ESPN feature humorously examined LeBron James' well‑known fondness for Bojangles' chicken as a light‑hearted contrast to his on‑court dominance. The piece highlighted how the superstar's food preferences have become a pop‑culture talking point.
key_points: James' frequent visits to Bojangles have become a recognizable habit.
The article used the food preference as a playful lens to discuss his personality.
No impact on his performance or team responsibilities was suggested.

articles.title: LeBron and Bronny James Share Father‑Son Moments in Game 3 Victory
articles.original_title: Lakers’ LeBron James, Bronny James create father-son memories in Game 3 win - Orange County Register
articles.summary: In a thrilling Game 3 win, LeBron James and his son Bronny created memorable moments on the court, highlighting their unique father‑son dynamic. The victory added to the Lakers' playoff push while showcasing Bronny's growing role.
key_points: LeBron and Bronny combined for key plays that helped secure the win.
The game marked a milestone moment for the father‑son duo in the NBA.
Their chemistry contributed to the Lakers' momentum in the series.

articles.title: LeBron James Calls Out Rockets for Disrespecting Son Bronny After Playoff Win
articles.original_title: LeBron James Criticizes Rockets for ‘Disrespect’ Surrounding Son Bronny After Playoff Win - Us Weekly
articles.summary: LeBron James publicly criticized the Houston Rockets organization for comments he deemed disrespectful toward his son, Bronny, following the team's recent playoff victory. The NBA star emphasized the importance of supporting young players and their families, especially as Bronny prepares for his own NBA debut.
key_points: LeBron expressed disappointment with the Rockets' remarks about Bronny after their playoff win.
He highlighted the need for respectful treatment of emerging talent and their families.
Bronny is expected to join the NBA soon, adding context to LeBron's concerns.

articles.title: LeBron James Explains How He Saves Energy for Crunch Time
articles.original_title: LeBron James Discusses How He Is Able To Conserve Energy For Crunch Time - Lakers Nation
articles.summary: In an interview with Lakers Nation, LeBron James detailed the conditioning and mental strategies he uses to conserve stamina for pivotal moments in games. He cited pacing, nutrition, and selective intensity as key components of his longevity and late‑game effectiveness.
key_points: LeBron focuses on pacing his effort throughout games to stay fresh for the fourth quarter.
He follows a strict nutrition and recovery regimen to maintain high performance.
Mental preparation and situational awareness help him deliver in clutch situations.

articles.title: LeBron James’ Sex Comedy Set for Netflix Release
articles.original_title: LeBron James’ Sex Comedy Sets Netflix Streaming Date - ComingSoon.net
articles.summary: A new comedy film starring LeBron James, centered on adult humor, has been given a streaming debut date on Netflix. The project, described as a “sex comedy,” adds to James’ growing off‑court entertainment portfolio.
key_points: The film will premiere on Netflix on a yet‑to‑be‑announced date.
LeBron is taking on a lead role in a comedy that explores adult themes.
The project marks another venture for James beyond basketball.

articles.title: Signs LeBron James May Be Approaching the End of His Elite Career
articles.original_title: LeBron James shows the latest sign that he is near the end of his brilliant career - MARCA
articles.summary: MARCA reports that recent on‑court observations suggest LeBron James is showing subtle signs of decline, such as reduced explosiveness and increased reliance on experience. While still productive, analysts note these changes could indicate the twilight of his historically brilliant career.
key_points: LeBron’s athleticism appears to be waning slightly, with less vertical leap and quickness.
He is compensating with smarter positioning and veteran instincts.
The observations fuel discussion about how many more seasons he can remain an elite player.

articles.title: OutKick Article Highlights Controversial Online Timeline Involving LeBron James
articles.original_title: The timeline got a little too horny for LeBron James Friday night | OutKick - foxnews.com
articles.summary: An OutKick piece references a social‑media timeline that featured explicit or “horny” content linked to LeBron James, sparking debate over the appropriateness of such material. The article discusses public reaction and the broader conversation about athletes’ digital footprints.
key_points: A controversial timeline with adult‑themed content involving LeBron circulated online.
The story generated discussion about privacy, consent, and the portrayal of athletes on the internet.
OutKick covered reactions from fans and media outlets regarding the incident.
